endpoints.name: get_current
endpoints.description: Get current weather conditions for a location

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Location query: city name, zip code, IP address, or lat,lon coordinates

parameters.name: aqi
parameters.description: Include air quality data: yes or no

endpoints.name: get_forecast
endpoints.description: Get weather forecast for a location for up to 14 days

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Location query: city name, zip code, IP address, or lat,lon coordinates

parameters.name: aqi
parameters.description: Include air quality data: yes or no

parameters.name: alerts
parameters.description: Include weather alerts: yes or no
